mission_object: Joint information about human biological state, natural dynamics, perturbation response, person-context heterogeneity, functional state, and population transport contributed by participant-event data.

parameter_blocks.estimand_role: mapping linked molecular, cellular, anatomical, functional, and observer measurements to current human biological state
state velocity, acceleration, regime transition, persistence, washout, rebound, and hysteresis without conflating operator assignment
whole-policy, component, endpoint, and dynamic operator-response effects under explicit assignment geometry
between-person and within-person variation in state, dynamics, response, and adaptive policy value
direct function and biologically linked cognition, performance, symptoms, physiology, behavior, and lived phenotype
transport over registered source and target biological-state, context, site, and population coordinates

event_information_contract.duplicate_rule: one physical measurement lineage contributes at most once to one joint information event
event_information_contract.jointness_rule: pairwise flags cannot establish an undeclared multi-measurement participant-event intersection

nuisance_adjustment_contract.method: Schur complement of the joint target-and-nuisance information matrix

prior_metric_contract.representation: hash-bound positive-definite matrix in the exact frozen parameter basis
prior_metric_contract.reparameterization_rule: information and prior metric transform together under any nonsingular coordinate change

reference_level_contract.later_level_rule: later levels add finer state, tissue, timescale, perturbation, heterogeneity, functional, and transport coordinates without rewriting frozen earlier levels

output_definitions.interpretation: base-10 log local hypothesis-volume contraction under the declared prior and joint information model

output_definitions.formula: Y_level = 100 sum_j min(ell_j, ell_j_star) / sum_j ell_j_star
output_definitions.interpretation: direction-wise completion of a frozen reference level; excess information in one direction cannot buy missing directions
uncapped information relative to the same frozen reference matrix

output_definitions.formula: Q(a) = sum_j ell_j_star 1[ell_j / ell_j_star >= a] / sum_j ell_j_star
output_definitions.interpretation: fraction of reference information directions reaching each externally versioned completion threshold

current_eval_family_authority.rule: this v2 structural parameter object cannot redefine, aggregate, or rank the six current eval families

evidence_lanes.coordinate_authority: protocol-committed event, assay, assignment, estimand, access-plan, and uncertainty coordinates
actual retained participant-events, assignments, missingness, quality control, and covariance
realized information reachable through lawful download or verified compute-to-data
frozen held-out task performance, calibration, nulls, and transfer receipts

invariants: valid positive-semidefinite event information cannot reduce absolute information
participant scale changes extensive capacity but not an unchanged intensive participant-event profile
perfect duplicates add zero conditional information
one shallow direction cannot fill unmeasured reference directions
whole-policy, component, endpoint, dynamic, and sequential estimands are not interchangeable
contrast rank is computed from explicit design matrices rather than top-level arm count
unknown, structural absence, interval uncertainty, and distributional uncertainty are distinct states
intrinsic and accessible reconstruction capacity are separate outputs
v1 scores and v2 outputs cannot share a leaderboard
